summary: Iteration 79: Bug fix verification for ListingDetailModal X button requiring two clicks. All 6 requested features verified working. The bug fix using closingRef pattern and direct onClose() call in handleClose() is confirmed working correctly.
passed_tests: FRONTEND: Listing detail modal X button closes modal on SINGLE click (data-testid='listing-modal-close') - PASSED - BUG FIXED!
FRONTEND: Listing detail modal opens correctly when clicking a listing card - PASSED
FRONTEND: Listing detail modal closes via Escape key (single press) - PASSED
FRONTEND: Browser back button closes the listing detail modal - PASSED
FRONTEND: URL updates to /honeypot/listing/:id when modal opened - PASSED
FRONTEND: URL returns to /honeypot when modal is closed - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX VERIFIED: closingRef pattern in ListingDetailModal.js (line 62) prevents double onClose calls
BUG FIX VERIFIED: onCloseRef pattern (lines 36-37) prevents useEffect dependency issues causing duplicate history pushState
BUG FIX VERIFIED: handleClose() (lines 75-81) calls onClose() directly instead of relying on async popstate event
URL management correctly pushes history state on modal open (line 65)
popstate handler correctly calls onCloseRef.current() only when closingRef.current is false (lines 68-70)
Dialog onOpenChange correctly calls handleClose() when closing (line 148)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing listings from Shop tab.
context_for_next_testing_agent: ListingDetailModal X button double-click bug is FIXED. The fix involved: 1) Using onCloseRef to store onClose callback and prevent useEffect dependency issues, 2) Using closingRef to prevent double onClose() calls, 3) Calling onClose() directly in handleClose() instead of relying on async popstate. All modal close methods work: X button (single click), Escape key, overlay click, browser back button. URL management works correctly - updates to /honeypot/listing/:id on open and returns to /honeypot on close. MOCKED: Resend email service is mocked.

bug_fix_details.original_issue: X button to close listing detail modal required two clicks instead of one
bug_fix_details.root_cause: Complex history management pattern with async popstate events and duplicate history pushState entries due to useEffect dependency issues
fix_applied: Added onCloseRef (React.useRef) to store onClose callback reference
Added closingRef (React.useRef) to track if modal is already closing
Modified handleClose() to set closingRef.current = true before history.back()
handleClose() now calls onClose() directly instead of relying on popstate event
popstate handler checks closingRef.current before calling onCloseRef.current()
bug_fix_details.verification_result: BUG FIXED - Modal now closes with single X button click
